# Generated by Codex from vanilla peasants_estate privilege definitions.
# These terms are negotiated with the Nobility but grant/revoke Peasants estate privileges.

pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_grant_privilege_visibility = {
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_free_peasantry
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_represented_in_parliament
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasant_owns_their_food
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_fewer_levies
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_yeomanry
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_protected_faith
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_allow_hunting
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_no_labor_sunday
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_communal_lands
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_partial_yield
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_in_administration
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_autonomous_villages
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_creaghts_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_masaniellos_fight
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_double_sabbath
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_ius_teutonicum
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_invite_german_settlers
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_haudenosaunee_labor_division
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_mita_system
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_salt_tax_exemption
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_ayuntamientos
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_cas_caballeros_villanos
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_ukr_kholop_protection
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_land_owning_farmers
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
}

pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_revoke_privilege_visibility = {
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_free_peasantry
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_represented_in_parliament
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasant_owns_their_food
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_fewer_levies
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_yeomanry
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_protected_faith
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_allow_hunting
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_no_labor_sunday
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_communal_lands
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_partial_yield
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_in_administration
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_autonomous_villages
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_creaghts_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_masaniellos_fight
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_double_sabbath
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_ius_teutonicum
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_invite_german_settlers
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_haudenosaunee_labor_division
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_mita_system
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_salt_tax_exemption
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_ayuntamientos
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_cas_caballeros_villanos
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_ukr_kholop_protection
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_land_owning_farmers
	remove_variable = pie_et_ppr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
}

pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_grant_privilege_visibility = yes
	pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_revoke_privilege_visibility = yes
}

pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_selected_privilege_terms = {
	remove_variable = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_fewer_levies
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_fewer_levies
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_yeomanry
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_yeomanry

	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_salt_tax_exemption

	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_cas_caballeros_villanos
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_ukr_kholop_protection
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_ukr_kholop_protection

	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_land_owning_farmers
	remove_variable = pie_et_psg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
	remove_variable = pie_et_psr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
}

pie_et_rebuild_peasant_grant_privilege_list = {
	clear_variable_list = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
			country_has_estate = estate_type:peasants_estate
		}
		"estate(estate_type:peasants_estate)" = {
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:allow_hunting }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:communal_lands }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:partial_yield }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:double_sabbath }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ius_teutonicum }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:mita_system }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:salt_tax_exemption }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:hab_tractatus_incorporalibus }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:cas_caballeros_villanos }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
				root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_grant_privileges target = prev } }
			}
		}
	}
}

pie_et_rebuild_peasant_revoke_privilege_list = {
	clear_variable_list = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
			country_has_estate = estate_type:peasants_estate
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:allow_hunting
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:communal_lands
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:partial_yield
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:double_sabbath
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ius_teutonicum
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:mita_system
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:salt_tax_exemption
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:hab_tractatus_incorporalibus
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:cas_caballeros_villanos
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
			}
			root = { add_to_variable_list = { name = pie_et_peasant_revoke_privileges target = prev } }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_rebuild_generated_peasant_grant_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_grant_privilege_visibility = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
			country_has_estate = estate_type:peasants_estate
		}
		"estate(estate_type:peasants_estate)" = {
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_free_peasantry value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_represented_in_parliament value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasant_owns_their_food value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_fewer_levies value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_yeomanry value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_protected_faith value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:allow_hunting }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_allow_hunting value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_no_labor_sunday value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:communal_lands }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_communal_lands value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:partial_yield }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_partial_yield value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_in_administration value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_autonomous_villages value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_creaghts_privilege value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_masaniellos_fight value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:double_sabbath }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_double_sabbath value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ius_teutonicum }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_ius_teutonicum value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_invite_german_settlers value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_haudenosaunee_labor_division value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:mita_system }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_mita_system value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:salt_tax_exemption }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_salt_tax_exemption value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:hab_tractatus_incorporalibus }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_ayuntamientos value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:cas_caballeros_villanos }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_cas_caballeros_villanos value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_ukr_kholop_protection value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_land_owning_farmers value = yes } }
			}
			random_possible_privilege = {
				limit = { this = estate_privilege:lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
				root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace value = yes } }
			}
		}
	}
}

pie_et_rebuild_generated_peasant_revoke_privilege_visibility = {
	pie_et_clear_generated_peasant_revoke_privilege_visibility = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable = pie_et_estate_nobles
			country_has_estate = estate_type:nobles_estate
			country_has_estate = estate_type:peasants_estate
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_free_peasantry value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_represented_in_parliament value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasant_owns_their_food value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_fewer_levies value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_yeomanry value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_protected_faith value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:allow_hunting
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_allow_hunting value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_no_labor_sunday value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:communal_lands
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_communal_lands value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:partial_yield
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_partial_yield value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_in_administration value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_autonomous_villages value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_creaghts_privilege value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_masaniellos_fight value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:double_sabbath
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_double_sabbath value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ius_teutonicum
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_ius_teutonicum value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_invite_german_settlers value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_haudenosaunee_labor_division value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:mita_system
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_mita_system value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:salt_tax_exemption
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_salt_tax_exemption value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:hab_tractatus_incorporalibus
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_hab_tractatus_incorporalibus value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_ayuntamientos value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:cas_caballeros_villanos
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_cas_caballeros_villanos value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_ukr_kholop_protection value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_land_owning_farmers value = yes } }
		}
		random_estate_privilege = {
			limit = {
				estate_type = estate_type:peasants_estate
				this = estate_privilege:lat_compromise_with_greek_populace
			}
			root = { set_variable = { name = pie_et_ppr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace value = yes } }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_free_peasantry }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_peasants_free_peasantry = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_free_peasantry }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_peasants_represented_in_parliament = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_peasants_represented_in_parliament = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_peasant_owns_their_food = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_peasant_owns_their_food }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_peasant_owns_their_food = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_peasant_owns_their_food }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_creaghts_privilege = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_creaghts_privilege }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_creaghts_privilege }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_creaghts_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_masaniellos_fight = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_masaniellos_fight }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_masaniellos_fight }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_masaniellos_fight value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_masaniellos_fight }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_masaniellos_fight }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_masaniellos_fight value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

	pie_et_init_trade = yes

		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_double_sabbath }

			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }

		}
	}

		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_cas_caballeros_villanos }

			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_cas_caballeros_villanos value = yes }

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_land_owning_farmers = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_land_owning_farmers }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_land_owning_farmers }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_land_owning_farmers value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_land_owning_farmers }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_land_owning_farmers }

		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_grant_peasant_privilege_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_grant_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_grant_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_select_revoke_peasant_privilege_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace = {
	pie_et_init_trade = yes
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
		pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
	}
	else = {
		if = {
			limit = { has_variable = pie_et_ppr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
			pie_et_clear_selected_privilege_terms = yes
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_psr_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_peasant_selected_revoke_privilege value = yes }
			set_variable = { name = pie_et_term_reduce_privilege value = yes }
		}
	}
}

pie_et_apply_generated_peasant_selected_privileges = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_free_peasantry }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_free_peasantry }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_free_peasantry
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_represented_in_parliament }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_represented_in_parliament
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasant_owns_their_food }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasant_owns_their_food }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasant_owns_their_food
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_fewer_levies }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_fewer_levies }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_fewer_levies
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_yeomanry }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_yeomanry }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_yeomanry
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_allowed_weapons_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_protected_faith }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_protected_faith }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_protected_faith
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_allow_hunting }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:allow_hunting
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_allow_hunting }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:allow_hunting
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_no_labor_sunday }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_no_labor_sunday }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:no_labor_sunday
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_communal_lands }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:communal_lands
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_communal_lands }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:communal_lands
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_partial_yield }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:partial_yield
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_partial_yield }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:partial_yield
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:access_to_royal_and_ecclesiastical_courts
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_in_administration }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_in_administration }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_in_administration
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_autonomous_villages }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_autonomous_villages }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_autonomous_villages
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:consolidated_corruption_of_the_peasants
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:peasants_no_poll_tax_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ara_sindicat_ara_remenca }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ara_sindicat_ara_remenca
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_creaghts_privilege }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_creaghts_privilege }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:creaghts_privilege
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_masaniellos_fight }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_masaniellos_fight }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:masaniellos_fight

	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_double_sabbath }

	if = {

	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ius_teutonicum }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ius_teutonicum
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_invite_german_settlers }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_invite_german_settlers }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:invite_german_settlers
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_haudenosaunee_labor_division }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_haudenosaunee_labor_division }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:haudenosaunee_labor_division
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_mita_system }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:mita_system
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_mita_system }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:mita_system
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_gradozadanje_and_gradobljudenlje_rights }

	if = {

	if = {

		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos

	if = {

		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ayuntamientos

	if = {

		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection

	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_ukr_kholop_protection }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:ukr_kholop_protection
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_land_owning_farmers }
		grant_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers
	}
	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psr_land_owning_farmers }
		revoke_estate_privilege = estate_privilege:land_owning_farmers

	if = {
		limit = { has_variable = pie_et_psg_lat_compromise_with_greek_populace }
